description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slender build, standing upright with both arms raised and extended diagonally upward. The figure is dressed in a sleeveless top and straight-cut pants, with visible seams and buttons on the top. The person has medium-length hair styled with a center part, and the facial features are stylized but human-like. The shoes are simple and closed-toe, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday look, and the extended arms create a striking, unusual pose.
description: An adult pedestrian in a casual sleeveless top and pants, standing upright with both arms raised diagonally upward, and medium-length hair parted in the center.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, sleeveless top with buttons, and both arms raised in a wide V-shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the straight fit of the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the top, and the arms crossing behind the figure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm extension, and the fit of the clothing from the opposite angle.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless top and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with both arms raised diagonally upward
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length straight hair with a center part
